title: Sunny
titleNative: Sunny
synopsis: The story of an orphanage, the children who live in it, and the beat-up old Nissan Sunny 1200 which provides them with a means of escape from their boring everyday lives.

title: Sousou no Frieren: ●● no Mahou Part 2
titleRomaji: Sousou no Frieren: ●● no Mahou Part 2
titleNative: 葬送のフリーレン ～●●の魔法～ 2クール
synonyms: Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Mini Anime
Sousou no Frieren: Marumaru no Mahou
葬送のフリーレン ミニアニメ
Frieren: Beyond Journey's End: Magic of ??
synopsis: A second batch of the ●● no Mahou shorts released monthly in the lead up to the TV anime's second season, starting with #12. Posted on the official YouTube account of TOHO animation, Frieren Twitter, and Frieren TikTok account. Includes: • Shinchou ga Nobiru Mahou (身長が伸びる魔法), released Apr 2, 2025. • Onaka-ippai ni Naru Mahou (おなかいっぱいになる魔法), released May 7, 2025. • Daitai Nan demo Kiru Mahou (大体なんでも切る魔法), released Jun 4, 2025. • Kousoku de Idou Suru Mahou (高速で移動する魔法), released Jul 2, 2025. • Karada no Mawari wo Suzushiku Suru Mahou (体のまわりを涼しくする魔法), released Aug 6, 2025. • Tokui Waza wo Fuujiru Mahou (得意技を封じる魔法), released Sep 3, 2025.

title: Though I Am an Inept Villainess
titleRomaji: Futsutsuka na Akujo de wa Gozaimasu ga: Suuguu Chouso Torikae Den
titleEnglish: Though I Am an Inept Villainess
titleNative: ふつつかな悪女ではございますが ~雛宮蝶鼠とりかえ伝~
synonyms: Though I Am an Inept Villainess: Tale of the Butterfly-Rat Body Swap in the Maiden Court
synopsis: As maidens from the Five Clans battle for the Crown Prince’s heart, jealous Keigetsu uses forbidden magic to swap bodies with the beloved Reirin. Switching places does not guarantee happiness for Keigetsu with her new body's ill health leaving her hanging on the verge of death. Meanwhile, Reirin, now wearing the face of a scorned outcast, must answer for Keigetsu’s crimes in a dangerous trial. The unlikely pair become increasingly entangled in each other’s lives and they will need to work together to survive after discovering the dark conspiracies brewing beneath the palace's genial surface. To confront the deadly threats lurking in the shadows, Reirin must embrace her new identity and defy their expectations of the court's inept villainess. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Tenshou shita Dai Seijo wa, Seijo de Aru Koto wo Hita Kakusu
titleRomaji: Tenshou shita Dai Seijo wa, Seijo de Aru Koto wo Hita Kakusu
titleNative: 転生した大聖女は、聖女であることをひた隠す
synonyms: A Tale of the Secret Saint
synopsis: Fia always dreamed of becoming a knight. Born into a family of knights, she’s the least talented among them, but she still clutches to her hope and trains with everything she has. When the day comes for her to slay a small demon and prove her worth, she ends up face to face with a dragon instead! A deadly injury makes her life flash before her eyes…and she suddenly remembers her former life, when she was a powerful Saint in a bygone era who defeated the Demon King. That life ended in pain because of who she was, making her fear ever becoming a Saint again. Now that the magic from her previous life has been rekindled, she may become a more powerful knight than she ever dreamed–if only she can survive long enough! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

tags.name: Female Protagonist

title: Neko to Ryuu
titleNative: 猫と竜
synopsis: The story follows a fire-breathing, human-hating dragon raised by a mother cat in a forest. The dragon, known affectionately as "Uncle Wing," watches over the many curious cats — such as one that goes on an adventure with a human prince, and another that lives in the city and people-watches as a hobby — and gradually warms up to humans along the way. (Source: Crunchyroll News)

title: Mousou Kagaku Series: Wandaba Style - Mix JUICE no Tsukurikata
titleRomaji: Mousou Kagaku Series: Wandaba Style - Mix JUICE no Tsukurikata
titleNative: 妄想科学シリーズ ワンダバスタイル みっくすJUICEの作り方
synopsis: Mix JUICE's members are about to give a concert, they are interviewed by journalists about how the band were created. Each member gave a different story! Then, each girl sing alone but only a part of the crowd is moved. Finally they perform together and then, we learn from the producer Hanagata how he recruited the girls to give birth to Mix JUICE.

tags.name: Idol
tags.description: Centers around the life and activities of an idol.

title: Toaru Anbu no ITEM
titleNative: とある暗部の少女共棲
synopsis: This is a story of four girls living in the "Dark Side" of Academy City. In Academy City where "ESP" has been recognized as a general science. Behind the peace, there is a Dark Side organization that undertakes missions that cannot be made public. "ITEM" is an elite unit consisting of four girls. Takitsubo Rikou is able to read and track the AIM fields emitted by those with abilities. Frenda Seivelun, who excels in combat using explosives and traps. Kinuhata Saiai, who can manipulate nitrogen at will and plays a defensive role. And one of the 7 Espers that Academy City is proud of: Mugino Shizuri. They live freely in the darkness of the Academy City, and quietly set their sights on their target...! This is a story of encounter, friendship, and darkness that eventually leads to a terrible incident! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Love Live! Nijigasaki Gakuen School Idol Doukoukai: Kanketsu-hen Saishuushou
titleRomaji: Love Live! Nijigasaki Gakuen School Idol Doukoukai: Kanketsu-hen Saishuushou
titleNative: ラブライブ！虹ヶ咲学園スクールアイドル同好会 完結編 最終章

synopsis: The final in the trilogy of Love Live! Nijigasaki Gakuen School Idol Doukoukai films that continues the story beyond season two and the OVA.

title: The Shy Hero and the Assassin Princesses
titleEnglish: The Shy Hero and the Assassin Princesses
titleNative: 気絶勇者と暗殺姫
synonyms: The Stunned Hero and the Assassin Princesses
synopsis: Hero Toto possesses great skills, but his extreme shyness has left him unable to form a party, causing him to remain stuck in the town where his journey began. One day, he is suddenly invited to join a party by three beautiful women—Ciel, Anemone, and Gore. Overjoyed at finally setting off on an adventure, Toto is filled with excitement... but little does he know, these women are dead set on killing him! A deathly harem romcom unfolds as the socially anxious hero, who faints from mere flustered excitement around women, finds himself the target of three deadly companions, each with their own reasons for wanting him gone! Note: Each episode streamed 1 week early on ABEMA. The original TV broadcast started on July 12th 2025.

title: Reborn as a Space Mercenary: I Woke Up Piloting the Strongest Starship!
titleRomaji: Mezametara Saikyou Soubi to Uchuusen-mochi datta node, Ikkodate Mezashite Youhei to shite Jiyuu ni Ikitai
titleEnglish: Reborn as a Space Mercenary: I Woke Up Piloting the Strongest Starship!
titleNative: 目覚めたら最強装備と宇宙船持ちだったので、一戸建て目指して傭兵として自由に生きたい
synopsis: Sato Takahiro was an ordinary office worker and hobbyist gamer until the day he woke up on a spaceship–one that strangely resembled a craft from a favorite space-shooter game. With a decked-out ship, a crew full of babes, and a fantastic universe to explore, he's going to make the most of his good luck and create the life he's always dreamed of! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Li'l Miss Vampire Can't Suck Right
titleEnglish: Li'l Miss Vampire Can't Suck Right
titleNative: ちゃんと吸えない吸血鬼ちゃん
synopsis: Luna Ishikawa is a dark and mysterious vampire—or so she'd like her new classmates to believe. The truth is, while she may be one of the not-so-mythical bloodsuckers, she doesn't really live up to the hype. She's short and clumsy, and she can't even suck blood properly! So when her classmate Tatsuta Ootori discovers her little “drinking problem,” he can't help but lend a hand. Can he nurse Luna from the small, timid animal she is into a fearsome creature of the night?! (Source: Yen Press)

title: My Melody & Kuromi
titleNative: My Melody & Kuromi
synonyms: マイメロディとクロミ
synopsis: My Melody opens a cake shop in Mariland. After encountering a heart in the forest, strange things start happening around her. Meanwhile, Kuromi's Japanese sweets shop across the street is always empty. Kuromi searches for the secret to My Melody's cakes. My Melody and Kuromi work hard to prepare for a sweets-making contest judged by the world-famous pastry chef Pistachio. However, no one knows that this will lead to an incident that threatens the fate of Mariland. (Source: Netflix)

title: Scarlet
titleNative: 果てしなきスカーレット
synopsis: Scarlet, the protagonist of this work, is a princess whose father, the king of a certain country, was murdered. However, after failing to exact revenge, Scarlet wakes up to find herself in the "Otherlands." In this "Otherlands," filled with madness, it is said that if one does not exact revenge on their nemesis and reach the "Infinity Land," they will become "nothingness" and disappear from existence. Will Scarlet be able to exact revenge on her nemesis without becoming "nothingness"? The story unfolds as the endless journey for revenge begins. (Source: Animate Times, Translated)

title: See You Tomorrow at the Food Court
titleEnglish: See You Tomorrow at the Food Court
titleNative: フードコートで、また明日。
synopsis: Meet Wada, who gives off an unapproachable vibe, and Yamamoto, who strikes fear into those around her because of her looks. Though the two girls attend separate high schools, they meet up at a shopping center’s food court almost every day. Take a little peek at the laid-back afternoons Wada and Yamamoto share as they reflect on the ups and downs of high school life together. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Himitsu no AiPri: Ring-hen
titleNative: ひみつのアイプリ リング編
synopsis: It's a new semester! Himari and Mitsuki have become second-year students of Paradise Private Academy! Their school lives become more and more lively with the introduction of new underclassmen full of individuality and personality. In the AiPri-Verse, new AiPri are appearing one after another! Everyone tries their hand at a brand new, never-before-seen Buzzrium Change! In the midst of all this, the mysterious Princess Ring Clover and her butler, Shimitsuu, are holding an Aipri contest. They say the winner will become an admired "Eternal Aipri." Himari and Mitsuki are all ready and full of fighting spirit! But it appears Princess Ring holds a very large secret... As their friends increase, so does the mysteries of the ring. The Ring arc finally begins! (Source: Offiical Website, translated)

title: Dogul Wang
titleNative: 도굴왕
synopsis: In the year 2025, mysterious tombs appeared all over the world, each housing an ancient relic granting supernatural abilities. The lucky few who quickly obtained these relics ruled over powerful monopolies. Others came to serve them, such as Jooheon Suh, a “raider” who hid in tombs to steal relics. Betrayed by his employer, Jooheon is left to die but instead finds himself transported 15 years in the past. Armed with years of tough raiding experience and knowledge of what is to come in the world of relics, does Jooheon have what it takes to become the “Tomb Raider King”? (Source: Yen Press)

title: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid: A lonely dragon wants to be loved
titleRomaji: Kobayashi-san Chi no Maidragon: Samishigariya no Ryuu
titleEnglish: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid: A lonely dragon wants to be loved
titleNative: 小林さんちのメイドラゴン さみしがりやの竜
synopsis: Theatrical follow-up to the second season Kobayashi-san Chi no Maidragon S and Kobayashi-san Chi no Maidragon S: Nippon no Omotenashi (Attend wa Dragon desu) OVA. "I don’t want to let go of her hand. Because, we are a family." Miss Kobayashi, Tohru, Kanna, and Iruru's peaceful lives are shattered when Kanna’s father, Kamun Kamui, leader of the Chaos Forces, arrives and forces her to return to the Dragon World to fix a past mistake. With a war brewing between Chaos and Harmony, Kanna must find a way to unite the two worlds but is torn between her loyalty to her friends and her father's demands. Miss Kobayashi, however, refuses to let her go and tries to mend Kanna and Kamui’s broken bond. As dragons clash, Iruru uncovers a hidden force manipulating the war. Can they stop the war before it consumes both worlds? (Source: Kyoto Animation YouTube Channel, Crunchyroll)

title: Cultural Exchange with a Game Centre Girl
titleEnglish: Cultural Exchange with a Game Centre Girl
titleNative: ゲーセン少女と異文化交流
synonyms: Game Center Shoujo to Ibunka Kouryuu
synopsis: Kusakabe Renji, a young man working at a game centre, sees an English girl named Lily Baker playing a crane game on Valentine’s Day. Seeing her fail repeatedly to win a prize, Renji can’t help but take action. The day after Lily finally gets her plushie, Renji receives an unexpected message from her that reads, “Be my valentine!” What started as a misunderstanding leads to cultural exchange! (Source: Crunchyroll)
